scripts.workspace:qqmusic:test:replay: cross-env QQMUSIC_API_HTTP_MODE=replay QQMUSIC_API_HTTP_FIXTURE_DIR=packages/qq-music-api/tests/cassettes npm run --workspace qq-music-api test:replay
scripts.workspace:qqmusic:record: cross-env QQMUSIC_API_HTTP_MODE=record QQMUSIC_API_HTTP_FIXTURE_DIR=packages/qq-music-api/tests/cassettes npm run --workspace qq-music-api record:fixtures
scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist, packages/qq-music-api/dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force *.log, manual-*.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.clean:all: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist, packages/qq-music-api/dist, node_modules, packages/qq-music-api/node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force *.log, manual-*.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run workspace:qqmusic:lint
scripts.test:all: npm run test:server && npm run workspace:qqmusic:test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:integration:qqmusic
